fields.explainZh: XenServer是否可以启用新的虚拟机。
fields.explainEn: Whether a new VM can be enabled for XenServer.
Expiration time of the XenServer license.

fields.explainZh: CPU的系列标识，可用来确定CPU属于哪一代产品。
fields.explainEn: CPU series, identifying the generation of the CPU.

fields.explainZh: CPU型号的编号，可用来确定CPU的制作技术以及属于该系列的第几代设计（或核心）。
fields.explainEn: CPU model ID, identifying the CPU technology and generation (or core).

fields.explainZh: CPU的步进值，可用来标识CPU的设计或制作版本。
fields.explainEn: CPU step value, identifying the CPU design or version.
Memory size being used by XAPI.

fields.explainZh: XAPI启动后申请分配的内存。

fields.explainEn: Name of the network adapter on the XenServer server.
IP address of the network adapter.
MAC address of the network adapter.
Subnet mask of the network adapter.
Duplex mode of the network adapter.
Tx rate of the network adapter.
Error packets received by the network adapter.
Rx rate of the network adapter.
Error packets sent by the network adapter.
Default storage repository of the host pool.

fields.explainZh: 主机池是否启用高可用性。
fields.explainEn: Whether the host pool is enabled with HA.
Primary server of the host pool.

fields.explainZh: 主机池是否启用负载均衡。
fields.explainEn: Whether the host pool is enabled with load balancing.
Number of hosts in the host pool.

fields.explainZh: 主机池中正在运行虚拟机的数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of running VMs in the host pool.
Number of snapshots in the host pool.

fields.explainZh: 主机池中存储库的数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of storage repositories in the host pool.

fields.explainZh: 主机池中共享存储库的数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of shared storage repositories in the host pool.
Number of templates in the host pool.

fields.explainZh: 主机池中虚拟机的数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of VMs in the host pool.

fields.explainZh: 存储是否可以在多个主机之间共享。
fields.explainEn: Whether the storage resource can be shared by multiple hosts.

fields.explainZh: 存储的虚拟容量，即存储中所有虚拟磁盘镜像的容量。
fields.explainEn: Total capacity of all virtual disk images.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟磁盘镜像是否可管理。
fields.explainEn: Whether the virtual disk image is manageable.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟磁盘镜像的描述信息。
fields.explainEn: Description of the virtual disk image.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机磁盘镜像是否为只读。
fields.explainEn: Whether the VM disk image is read only.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机磁盘镜像是否可共享。
fields.explainEn: Whether the VM disk image can be shared.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机使用的虚拟磁盘镜像名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the virtual disk image used by the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机磁盘镜像所在存储的名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the storage where the VM disk image resides.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机磁盘镜像的大小。
虚拟机的最大动态内存。
fields.explainEn: Maximum dynamic memory of the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机的最小动态内存。
fields.explainEn: Minimum dynamic memory of the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机的最大静态内存，即虚拟机可以使用的内存上限。
fields.explainEn: Maximum static memory of the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机的最小静态内存，即不会发生崩溃的内存。
fields.explainEn: Minimum static memory of the VM.
Whether the virtual network adapter is active.
Read rate of the virtual network adapter.
Write rate of the virtual network adapter.
MAC address of the virtual network adapter.
MTU of the virtual network adapter.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟网卡连接的网络名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the network connected to the virtual network adapter.
Rx rate of the virtual network adapter.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟网卡的接收错误数。
fields.explainEn: Error packets received by the virtual network adapter.
Tx rate of the virtual network adapter.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟网卡的发送错误数。
fields.explainEn: Error packets sent by the virtual network adapter.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机使用的虚拟网卡名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the virtual network adapter used by the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟块设备是否为启动盘。
fields.explainEn: Whether the virtual block device is the boot drive.
Whether the virtual block device is active.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机使用的虚拟块设备名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the virtual block device used by the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟块设备是否为未被使用。
fields.explainEn: Whether the virtual block device is unused.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟块设备的工作模式，只读（RO）或读写（RW）。
fields.explainEn: Operating mode of the virtual block device, which can be read-only (RO) or read-write (RW).

fields.explainZh: 虚拟块设备的当前状态码。
fields.explainEn: State code of the virtual block device.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟块设备是否获得了存储级锁。
fields.explainEn: Whether the virtual block device obtains a storage lock.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟块设备的类型，例如磁盘（DISK）或光盘（CD）。
fields.explainEn: Virtual block device type, such as DISK or CD.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟块设备是否支持热插拔。
fields.explainEn: Whether the virtual block device supports hot swapping.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
